subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath adorned man with the ornament of utterance and taught him, through His word, the mysteries of what hath been and what lieth within the realm of possibility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی زین الانسان بطراز البیان و علمه سر ما کان و ما من الامکان بقوله
